examples: A day's employment of an unneeded tile-setter has meant a day's disemployment of a sweater knitter or machine handler.
She is showing me how to use a knitter.
This stylish sweater was knitted by a young knitter .
She was the only one with her own TV show, the only one with her own magazine, the only one who could cook, the only competent decorator, the only knitter, the sole diva.
Take Clark's daughter, who is an active knitter.
